profile.name: Ali Raza
profile.experience: 5+ years in web development, specializing in React, Node.js, and modern cloud architectures.
profile.bio: I am a passionate developer dedicated to building high-quality, scalable web applications. My expertise lies in creating seamless user experiences using the latest frontend and backend technologies.

projects.title: Shawarma Store
projects.description: Shawarma Store is a mobile app built with React Native, Node.js, Firebase, and SQL, enabling seamless ordering, real-time updates, and secure data management.
projects.caseStudy: This project involved building a highly scalable e-commerce infrastructure capable of handling thousands of requests per second. We implemented a microservices architecture for the backend and a responsive Next.js frontend for optimal performance.
projects.softContributions: Led a team of 4 developers, established CI/CD protocols, and facilitated bi-weekly stakeholder reviews to ensure alignment with business goals.

projects.title: AI Task Manager
projects.description: Smart task management app that uses AI to prioritize and categorize user tasks.
projects.caseStudy: The challenge was to create a task manager that feels 'alive'. Using Gemini AI, we built a system that analyzes user habits and suggests task prioritizations in real-time. The backend leverages PostgreSQL for relational data and Redis for caching.
projects.softContributions: Collaborated directly with UI designers to refine AI feedback loops based on user testing sessions. Mentored junior devs on implementing vector search.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A clean and modern portfolio showcasing personal achievements and services.
projects.caseStudy: Built with speed and aesthetic in mind, this portfolio utilizes Vite for rapid development and Framer Motion for high-fidelity animations. The design follows a strict split-layout SaaS aesthetic.
projects.softContributions: Implemented a modular component architecture that allows for easy content updates. Optimized for SEO and performance achieving 100 on Lighthouse.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Building responsive and scalable websites using modern frameworks.
services.longDescription: I specialize in creating high-performance, accessible, and scalable web applications. My approach focuses on clean architecture and modern technology stacks to ensure your digital presence is future-proof.
benefits: Seamless user experience across all devices

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: Creating intuitive and visually appealing user interfaces.
services.longDescription: Design is more than just aesthetics; it's about solving problems. I create design systems that are both beautiful and functional, focusing on user journeys that convert and delight.

services.title: API Development
services.description: Developing robust and secure backend APIs for various applications.
services.longDescription: The backbone of any modern application is its API. I build secure, documented, and high-available backend systems that can power web, mobile, and third-party integrations.

testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.text: Ali's ability to translate complex requirements into elegant, high-performance code is unmatched. He delivered our platform ahead of schedule.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.text: Working with Ali was a game-changer. His expertise in full-stack engineering and AI integration helped us scale our user base by 300% in six months.

testimonials.name: Emma Rodriguez
testimonials.text: The custom design system Ali built for us has significantly reduced our development overhead. Truly a visionary developer.
